channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ottawa Residents Face Insurance Denials for Groundwater Flood Damage
item.description: Margaret Cooper, a 71-year-old Ottawa homeowner, discovered her insurance claim was denied despite having 'enhanced' flood coverage. Her basement flooded during a July 1 storm, with water seeping thro...

item.title: Marcos begins official Singapore visit to strengthen bilateral cooperation and meet investors
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. departed for Singapore on Tuesday afternoon for an official visit, according to Malacañang. The President left at 5:27 p.m. together with several government officials as...

item.title: KSE-100 Plummets 6,400 Points Amid Escalating US-Iran Tensions
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) benchmark index, KSE-100, experienced a sharp decline of 6,408.23 points (3.56%) on Tuesday, dropping to 173,518.81 from the previous close of 179,927.04. This massiv...

item.title: Telangana ACB Conducts Raids on HMDA Chief Engineer's Residence in Disproportionate Assets Probe
item.description: The Telangana Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB) conducted simultaneous searches at the residence of Hyderabad Metropolitan Development Authority (HMDA) Chief Engineer B. Ravinder and 11 other locations on ...

item.title: Tony Forbes addresses leaked texts involving son AKA and Tembe family amid inquest
item.description: Tony Forbes, father of late rapper Kiernan 'AKA' Forbes, has shared WhatsApp messages between his son, Anele Tembe (who died in 2021), and the Tembe family lawyer. The texts, leaked by Forbes, alleged...

item.title: Dung beetles help reduce fly populations and carbon emissions
item.description: The article explores how introduced dung beetles have transformed Australian agriculture by drastically reducing biting fly populations and cutting methane emissions. CSIRO's introduction of over 50 s...

item.title: Kim Kardashian Shares Family Vacation Photos Featuring Lewis Hamilton with Her Children
item.description: Kim Kardashian has shared a series of photos from a recent family vacation in Idaho, showcasing her relationship with Formula 1 champion Lewis Hamilton. The SKIMS founder posted images on Instagram de...

item.title: KWASU Research Teams Secure International and National Grants, Boosting Academic Excellence
item.description: Four research teams from Kwara State University (KWASU) have secured competitive research grants from two renowned funding organisations, reaffirming the university’s growing reputation for research e...

item.title: House Republicans Face Internal Conflict Over Pentagon Funding Without Cuts
item.description: House Republicans are embroiled in another internal conflict over a proposed $70 billion funding package for the Department of Defense that would bypass traditional budgetary constraints. The plan, wh...

item.title: Miss Manners Advises on Bridal Shower Etiquette Controversy
item.description: The article discusses a social etiquette dilemma involving a woman who faced backlash for wearing a casual white dress to a bridal shower. The incident sparked controversy among her daughter and frien...

item.title: Queensland Homeowner Surprised by Carpet Python on Door Camera
item.description: A Queensland family was woken in the early hours by a surprise visitor captured on their front door camera. Snake catcher Dan Busstra explained that the footage showed a carpet python slithering over ...

item.title: India lodges protest with Iran after Indian sailor is killed in Strait of Hormuz tanker attack
item.description: India summoned Iran's Deputy Chief of Mission in New Delhi, Mohammad Javad Hosseini, after an Indian crew member was killed in a missile strike on two United Arab Emirates (UAE) oil tankers transiting...

item.title: San Fermin Bull Run Festival Concludes with Two Injuries
item.description: The San Fermin bull run festival in Pamplona, Spain, concluded with two individuals sustaining serious injuries after being gored by a bull. The incident occurred during the final day of the annual ev...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates Over Control of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The prolonged conflict between the United States and Iran has intensified over control of the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz. US President Donald Trump ended a ceasefire, reimposed sanctions on ...

item.title: Pakistan Condemns Houthi Attacks on Saudi Arabia, Supports KSA Security
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif of Pakistan has strongly condemned the recent attacks on Saudi Arabia, emphasizing that such acts threaten regional peace and stability. He reiterated Islamabad's unwaver...

item.title: Clark Develops Comprehensive Airport City Infrastructure
item.description: The article discusses Clark's ambitious project to establish its facility as the first and only airport city in the region. This initiative aims to integrate air transport with urban development, crea...

item.title: Astronomers Detect Sugar in Galactic Gas Cloud, Suggesting Prebiotic Ingredients
item.description: Astronomers have detected erythrulose, a sugar found in raspberries and self-tanners, in a gas cloud near the center of the Milky Way. While not essential for life itself, the molecule can convert int...

item.title: PCEA Mai a Ihii Booth High School Closure Due to Principal's Arrest and Safety Concerns
item.description: PCEA Mai a Ihii Booth High School in Kikuyu, Kiambu County, has been closed indefinitely following safety concerns linked to the arrest of its principal and board chairperson. The closure was announce...

item.title: Argentina's World Cup semifinal clash with England faces refereeing controversy scrutiny
item.description: Argentina's progression to the World Cup semifinals against England has sparked renewed debate over refereeing decisions, with critics accusing the tournament of favoring Lionel Messi's team. The cont...

item.title: NBI finds no threats against Sara Duterte during impeachment trial
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) testified during Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial that no relevant threats were found against her life. NBI Bangsamoro chief Jeremy Lotoc stat...
